faqs.question: How much does cockroach extermination cost in Kearny, NJ?
faqs.answer: Our cockroach extermination services in Kearny range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property and severity of the infestation. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any treatment, ensuring transparent pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a cockroach problem in Kearny?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Kearny residents in most cases. Understanding that cockroach infestations require urgent attention, we prioritize rapid response times and can typically schedule your treatment within 24 hours of your call.

faqs.question: What methods do you use for cockroach extermination in Kearny homes?
faqs.answer: We employ a combination of proven treatments including gel baits, residual sprays, dust applications in wall voids, and insect growth regulators. Our integrated pest management approach targets cockroaches at all life stages while being safe for your family and pets when applied by our certified technicians.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your cockroach extermination services in Kearny?
faqs.answer: Yes, we stand behind our work with a service guarantee. If cockroaches return within the warranty period following your treatment, we'll come back and re-treat your property at no additional charge. We also provide follow-up recommendations to help prevent future infestations.
